llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Import Export Asia Pacific (Executive) - Japanese Speaker
job.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
job.description: Objectives of the Position Managing and maintenance of all inbound and outbound Transportation management and documentation processes in support of assigned countries Archiving of all applicable documentation in accordance to company and regulatory guidelines Proactively escalate cases of deviations in transportation activities to bring shipment back on track in meeting defined and agreed delivery dates Meet defined service levels and any agreed qualitative requirements pertaining core transportation and documentation scope of work Support monitoring and evaluation of service provider’s performance referring to agreed KPIs and conduct periodic quality reviews Main Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Responsible on logistics fulfilment processes (including SAP TM maintenance and process adherence) for all import and export shipments by working closely with country import export team and hub-based overseas delivery services community Monitor, analyze, and manage operational issues where possible, and escalate to the appropriate country team, import/export stakeholders, or Team Lead for resolution and process improvement. Manage non-conformances (NCM), maintain issue logs, and ensure corrective actions are implemented where applicable. Coordinate and monitor BASF import and export shipments to ensure timely and accurate execution. Participating in system and new process flow testing where required. Initiate continuous improvement initiatives and issue resolution of supply chain issues pertaining inbound and outbound transportation management on behalf of assigned countries. Participation in import export community meetings / activities where required and support service provider management and service delivery performance in assigned countries from global services hub Other tasks and activities as assigned, relevant to the competency and skillset of this role and for development purposes Manage BASF import export shipment monitoring and coordination. Work closely with service providers and 3PL partners to ensure smooth import and export arrangements, timely customs clearance, and effective information flow. Act as the primary contact point for service providers and CSO, maintaining strong working relationships and ensuring timely updates on any related issues. Responsible to analyze issues and manage where possible, escalating to Team Lead for attention or improvements required Manage all non-trade Purchase Requisitions and Purchase Orders for...
